description_long: This sculpture depicts three nude female figures standing closely together in an intimate embrace, their bodies intertwined in a circular formation. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with smooth, idealized anatomical features and flowing hair. The central figure faces forward, while the two flanking figures turn slightly inward, their arms draped around each other's shoulders and backs. The group stands on an oval base, which is subtly textured and supports the weight of the figures. The rear view reveals the detailed musculature and curvature of their backs, as well as the gentle contact of their limbs. The material appears to be a pale, stone-like substance, giving the sculpture a timeless and elegant appearance.
description: A classical-style sculpture of three nude women embracing in a circular formation, rendered in smooth, pale stone. The figures are intricately detailed and stand on an oval base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces and torsos of the three women, with their arms intertwined and the central figure facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures, the curvature of their backs, and the way their arms wrap around each other.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs and legs of the figures, as well as the detailed sculpting of their hair and the oval base.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the embrace and the dynamic arrangement of the arms and heads.
attribute_subject_matter: three nude female figures in an embrace
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
